mapper.select:
SELECT io.id AS id, p.id AS presaleOrderId, pc.id AS confirmId, p.brand_id AS brandId, p.brand_name AS brandName, COALESCE(io.contract_no, pc.contract_no, p.seller_contract_no) AS contractNo, COALESCE(pc.buyer_partner_name, p.customer_reference) AS customerName, io.warehouse_id AS warehouseId, io.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, COALESCE(io.order_date, p.order_date) AS orderDate, COALESCE(io.expected_arrival_date, pc.expected_arrival_date, p.expected_date) AS expectedArrivalDate, CASE WHEN io.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS uploadStatus FROM erp_presale_order p INNER JOIN erp_presale_confirm pc ON pc.presale_order_id = p.id LEFT JOIN erp_inbound_order io ON io.presale_order_id = p.id AND io.confirm_id = pc.id WHERE 1 = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM erp_presale_packing pp WHERE pp.presale_order_id = p.id AND (pp.confirm_id = pc.id OR pp.confirm_id IS NULL) ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM erp_presale_attachment ac WHERE ac.presale_order_id = p.id AND ac.attachment_type = 'CUSTOMS' AND (ac.confirm_id = pc.id OR ac.confirm_id IS NULL) ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM erp_presale_attachment aq WHERE aq.presale_order_id = p.id AND aq.attachment_type = 'QUARANTINE' AND (aq.confirm_id = pc.id OR aq.confirm_id IS NULL) )
AND ( p.seller_contract_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.customer_reference LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pc.buyer_partner_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.brand_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pc.contract_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY COALESCE(io.update_time, p.update_time) DESC, p.id DESC
